response: *"Christopher Nolan’s *Oppenheimer* (2023) is a gripping drama and historical epic that reimagines the life of J. Robert Oppenheimer, the scientist behind the atomic bomb, through a meticulously crafted narrative. With an 180-minute runtime and a $100 million budget, the film delivered an unprecedented $952 million at the box office, cementing its status as a modern blockbuster while earning widespread acclaim—earning an 8.3 IMDb rating and a perfect 93% on Rotten Tomatoes. It also won the prestigious Oscar for Best Picture, showcasing its critical and commercial success."*
